problem.title: MULLS cluster discovery on KITTI Odom seq 07 full (1102 frames)
problem.question: Which MULLS profile family is strongest on KITTI Odom seq 07 full?

variants.label: KITTI default
variants.intent: A-LOAM-style features + multi-metric scan-to-map (line/plane/point) baseline for HDL-64E.
variants.note: Multi-metric scan-to-map (line/plane/point Ceres) after A-LOAM-style feature odometry (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarser voxels, lighter Ceres, shorter submap window, sparser point metric.
variants.note: Multi-metric scan-to-map (line/plane/point Ceres) after A-LOAM-style feature odometry (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Finer map voxels, more knn, deeper Ceres, longer history.
variants.note: Multi-metric scan-to-map (line/plane/point Ceres) after A-LOAM-style feature odometry (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
